ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the function category of the test case */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Description of what the test case does */,
  "expected_result" TEXT /* Expected result of the test case execution */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status (P/F) of the test case */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the test case */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test case was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test case was last updated */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the test case (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "test_plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test plan the test case belongs to */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last modified the test case */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test case was last modified */,
  "test_case_type" TEXT /* Type of the test case (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "test_case_tags" TEXT /* Tags for the test case for easier filtering and searching */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_test_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_plan_id") REFERENCES test_plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result entry */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test case being executed */,
  "executed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who executed the test case */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case was executed */,
  "actual_result" TEXT /* Actual result obtained from the test execution */,
  "pass_fail" TEXT /* Pass or Fail status based on the actual result */,
  "test_case_version" TEXT /* Version of the test case when the result was recorded */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Testing environment (e.g., development, staging, production) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes for the test result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_executed_by FOREIGN KEY ("executed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Tester, Developer, Admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last active activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each function category */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the function category (e.g., Security) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the function category */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the function category */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the function (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the test plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the test plan covers */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the test plan */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test plan was created */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the test plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the test plan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test plan (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_plans_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_plan_cases" (
  "plan_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association of test case and test plan */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test plan */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test case */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the test case within the test plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_plan_cases_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_plan_cases_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES test_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "execution_logs" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each execution log */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test case executed */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date of execution */,
  "executed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the executor */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the execution */,
  "pass_fail" TEXT /* Pass or Fail status of the execution */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Testing environment (e.g., development, staging, production) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_execution_logs_executed_by FOREIGN KEY ("executed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_execution_logs_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "related_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related test case or defect */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the attached file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., screenshot, log) */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who uploaded the file */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was uploaded */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test case (if applicable) */,
  "defect_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the defect (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the recipient */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was read */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., test result, defect report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
